clEntries.7.0.3: v7.0.2: Fixed SDK v3 compliance crash when accessing device flow cards, Resolved duplicate Flow card trigger IDs that blocked app validation, Fixed unlinked sub-gang capabilities on TS0003 multi-gang switches, Corrected energy multiplier reporting for `_TZ3000_wzmuk9ai` plugs, Fixed Zbeacon plug connectivity and state reporting
clEntries.7.0.2: v7.0.2: Fixed flow card crashes, TS0003 gang linking, and energy meter reporting. Added TS110E support, strict battery filters, and improved Tuya-Bridge compatibility across 221 drivers.
clEntries.7.0.1: Fixed flow card crashes and device ID errors, resolved unlinked sub-gang controls on TS0003 switches, fixed duplicate flow trigger IDs, and added support for new device fingerprints.
clEntries.7.0.0: Fixed flow trigger errors, TS0003 gang linking, and energy metering. Added TS110E support, optimized HOBEIAN sensors, and improved BVB stability for radar/LCD devices.
clEntries.5.12.3: v5.12.2: Fixed energy multiplier for device _TZ3000_wzmuk9ai., Resolved connection issues for soil sensors and LCD sensors, adding new fingerprints., Added support for new device variants, enhancing compatibility with additional Zigbee devices.
clEntries.5.12.2: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.12.2 adds support for new device variants and resolves several fingerprint issues.
clEntries.5.12.1: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.12.1 adds support for new device variants and resolves several fingerprint issues.
clEntries.5.12.0: Major stabilization release: Integrated Parallel Bot Handler for faster maintenance, fixed eWeLink/SONOFF plug support (Issue #194), and resolved multi-gang capability mapping bugs.
clEntries.5.11.208: Added Zbeacon support and fixed fingerprint casing regression in Universal Tuya Zigbee app.
clEntries.5.11.206: v5.11.205: Added 3 new fingerprints to improve device compatibility., Integrated 3 new fingerprints for better support of Zigbee devices.
